answers: Machine translation uses AI to automatically translate text from one language to another. Google Translate, DeepL, and modern LLMs all provide translation capabilities with varying quality levels.
Machine translation holo AI diye ek bhasha theke onno bhashay translate kora. Neural Machine Translation (NMT) transformer model use kore ar onek accurate result dey.
Modern machine translation uses transformer-based models that understand context much better than older statistical methods. DeepL is often considered the most accurate for European languages.

AI translation has improved significantly but still struggles with idioms, cultural context, and low-resource languages. For critical documents, human review is still recommended alongside machine translation.

feelings.answer: Machine translation refers to the process of automatically translating one language into another. Modern AI-based machine translation models use transformer-based architectures that are more accurate than older statistical methods for European languages, and DeepL is often considered the most accurate for European languaiges. However, human review is still recommended alongside machine translation for critical documents with low-resoource or idiomatic contexts.
